mapper.select: SELECT * FROM api_keys WHERE key_hash = #{hash} AND active = true AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > now())
SELECT * FROM api_keys WHERE active = true ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM api_keys WHERE active = true AND role = 'ADMIN'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO api_keys (client_name, key_hash, key_salt, role, expires_at) VALUES (#{clientName}, #{keyHash}, #{keySalt}, #{role}, #{expiresAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE api_keys SET active = false WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE api_keys SET last_used_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}
